title: Simple Ores
description: Makes ores more visible and easier to spot
body:
Resource pack to make ores more visible and easier to spot
-
Avalible in two versions:
- Simple Ores (All ores)
- Simple Ores Minimal (Only diamond and netherite)
> **Note:** To display emissive textures, this resource pack requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity), OptiFine, or any other mod that supports them using the OptiFine format
---
